case_title: MARY TEHANEY VS. KEEN HIRE INC., AN ILLINOIS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEHANEY, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KEEN HIRE INC., AN ILLINOIS CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
